parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5', max_tokens: 1500, system: 'You are a release-notes editor for the QC Manager product. Rewrite the GitHub release notes below into a concise, user-facing changelog in Markdown. Group changes under ### Added, ### Changed, ### Fixed, and ### Removed where appropriate. Keep it factual, drop CI/chore/version-bump noise, and do not invent features. Output only the changelog Markdown with no preamble.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.content_markdown }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ version_number: $json.version_number, title: $json.title, content_markdown: $json.content_markdown, is_published: $json.is_published, generated_by_ai: $json.generated_by_ai, source: $json.source, source_reference: $json.source_reference }) }}
